focus: US-listed companies from the AI Stock Radar plus optional extra US tickers; large global institutions are monitored when they appear in public SEC filings.
source_limits: 13F is delayed quarterly data and cannot prove live selling by itself.
13D and 13G are threshold-based beneficial ownership filings.
Form 4 covers insiders, directors, officers, and 10 percent holders, not every institution.
FINRA short data is pressure context, not proof of institutional selling.
